response.justification: The candidate lacks the core embedded C programming experience and direct exposure to Linux kernel modifications, which are critical for this role. While they demonstrate strong software development skills and polyglot programming ability, their background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and high-level languages (TypeScript, JavaScript, D, etc.) rather than embedded systems, networking, or security technologies relevant to LAN-switch products. Japanese language proficiency is also not indicated in the resume.
strengths: Strong software development experience with a diverse tech stack (C, C++, TypeScript, JavaScript, D, etc.)
Demonstrated ability to work in collaborative environments and contribute to open-source projects
Proven problem-solving skills and adaptability across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded)
concerns: No evidence of embedded systems or firmware development experience
No demonstrated proficiency in C for UNIX embedded development or Linux kernel modifications
Lacks required native-level Japanese language proficiency and does not meet the core technical prerequisites for the role

key_factors.factor: Embedded C and Linux kernel experience
